title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Category Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
